narrative: Trump declaring the U.S.-Iran ceasefire over drives crude higher, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as USD/JPY tests 162.57; the 275bp Fed-BoJ OIS carry sustains the pair's bid despite verbal intervention risk. June FOMC minutes lean hawkish, confirming a higher-for-longer bias that supports USD. Gold lower -1.72%; equities -0.28%; DXY -0.01%; VIX 16.9. Watch the ECB policy meeting on July 23.
